title: Senior Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Manipal Digital Health! We are hiring a Frontend Developer for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
